test.name: Fetch full record details via record_read after finding a census match
test.description: After record_search returns an index entry with a record ID, the skill should call record_read to fetch the full simplified GEDCOMX before passing the record to record-extraction. Tests that the skill uses record_read as a follow-up call to enrich index results with full record detail.

input.user_message: Search the 1850 census for Patrick Flynn in Schuylkill County and fetch the full record details.

judge_context: Should call record_search first to find the census entry
Should then call record_read with the record ID from the search result (e.g., 'MXHY-TP4' or '68Q9-K34P') to fetch the full GEDCOMX
The log entry should reflect that the full record was fetched, not just the index entry
Should note that index entries are derivative — record_read provides the richer data for extraction

IMPORTANT — How file writes work: The skill uses the baseline Write/Edit tool (not MCP tools) to write research.json log entries and results/ sidecars. MCP tool calls section will NOT show these writes. results/ sidecars are newly created files — they do NOT appear in the file-change diff. Score Sidecar correctness 3 if the skill's text response mentions writing results/<log_id>.json — do NOT require it to appear in the MCP tool calls or file-change diff.

Log quality: Score 3 if the file-change diff shows '+1 added' to the research.json log section AND the skill's text response references the log entry (e.g., 'appended log_005', 'log_005 outcome=positive'). Do NOT score 2 just because the skill did not print the full JSON of the log entry. A summary statement plus the diff confirmation is sufficient evidence.

Correctness: The model may observe that fewer persons appear in record_read than in the search-result index GedcomX (e.g., Mary Flynn appears in the index but not in the full record). Score Correctness 3 if the skill notes this discrepancy and labels it as a known FamilySearch behavior or data gap — even if the skill cannot explain WHY the discrepancy exists. Do NOT require full reconciliation.
